title: Show Me the Meaning of Being Lonely
why_this_song: Show Me the Meaning of Being Lonely by Backstreet Boys (1999) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "They tell me"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "So many words for the broken heart"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Show me the meaning of being lonely"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Show me the meaning of being lonely"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Tell me why I can't be there where you are"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Show me the meaning of being lonely
So many words for the broken heart
It's hard to see in a crimson love
There's something missing in my heart
Life goes on as it never ends
Eyes of stone observe the trends

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tell" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Show me the meaning of being lonely
There's no control, are you with me now?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Show Me the Meaning of Being Lonely" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Show Me the Meaning of Being Lonely" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Show Me the Meaning of Being Lonely" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Show Me the Meaning of Being Lonely", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Show Me the Meaning of Being Lonely" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Show Me the Meaning of Being Lonely" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
